description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a thick layer of glossy chocolate ganache draped over the top, creating a smooth, slightly wavy edge. The sides of the cake are decorated with alternating bands of light pink and off-white icing, adorned with small pink dots for added detail. The base of the cake features a piped, ruffled border in white, giving it a festive and finished appearance. Four blue and white striped candles with orange flames are evenly spaced on top, adding a celebratory touch. The cake appears soft and moist, with the icing and ganache providing a rich, creamy texture. The overall look is playful and inviting, suitable for birthdays or festive urban gatherings.
description: A round, single-tier cake with chocolate ganache, pink and white icing, and four blue-striped candles on top. Decorative piped borders and small pink dots enhance its festive appearance.
description_view_0: Three blue-striped candles are visible on top, with the chocolate ganache and pink-white icing bands clearly seen along with the piped white base.
description_view_1: All four blue-striped candles are visible, showing the cake's full decorative top and the wavy ganache edge.
description_view_2: Three candles are visible from this angle, with the chocolate ganache and pink icing bands prominent, and the piped base detail clear.
description_view_3: All four candles are visible, with the cake's decorative icing and piped base fully displayed.
